title: ctenitis shikokiana
intro: Ctenitis shikokiana, also known as the Japanese fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis shikokiana include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and it can also be found in capsule or tablet form for convenient consumption.
